sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_symbols (id Int32, symbol String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_symbols VALUES (1, 'symbolA'), (2, 'symbolB'), (3, 'symbolC');
SELECT demangle(symbol) AS function_name FROM test_symbols WHERE id = 1;
SELECT NOT demangle(symbol) = '' AS is_demangled FROM test_symbols WHERE id = 2;
SELECT demangle(addressToSymbol(x.id)) AS demangled_symbol FROM test_symbols x WHERE NOT x.symbol = '';
SELECT demangle(symbol), COUNT(*) FROM test_symbols GROUP BY demangle(symbol) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT NOT emptyString() AS is_empty FROM (SELECT demangle(addressToSymbol(id)) AS func_name FROM test_symbols) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE trace_test (trace String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY trace;
INSERT INTO trace_test VALUES ('traceA'), ('traceB'), ('traceC');
SELECT demangle(symbol) FROM (SELECT trace FROM trace_test WHERE NOT trace = '') AS traces WHERE demangle(symbol) != '';
SELECT demangle(addressToSymbol(123456789)) AS valid_symbol FROM trace_test WHERE NOT trace = 'invalid';
SELECT NULLIF(demangle(addressToSymbol(id)), '') AS safe_demangle FROM test_symbols WHERE id < 5;
SELECT demangle(symbol) AS demangled, NOT trace = '' AS is_valid FROM trace_test JOIN test_symbols ON trace_test.trace = test_symbols.symbol;
SELECT demangle(addressToSymbol(x.id)) AS func_name FROM (SELECT id FROM test_symbols WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_symbols WHERE id < 0)) AS x;
SELECT demangle(addressToSymbol(0)) AS zero_symbol, NOT emptyString() AS is_non_empty FROM test_symbols;
SELECT demangle(arrayStringConcat(arrayMap(y -> demangle(addressToSymbol(y)), arrayJoin([123456789, 987654321])))) AS array_demangled;
CREATE TABLE nullable_test (nullable_symbol String DEFAULT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY nullable_symbol;
INSERT INTO nullable_test VALUES (NULL), ('symbolX'), (NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nullable_test WHERE NOT nullable_symbol IS NULL;
SELECT demangle(addressToSymbol(123456)) AS single_valid_symbol, NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM nullable_test WHERE nullable_symbol IS NULL) AS has_no_nulls FROM dual;
SELECT demangle(addressToSymbol(x.id)) AS symbol_name FROM (SELECT id FROM test_symbols WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM nullable_test WHERE nullable_symbol IS NULL)) AS x;
